title: merge app and request context
review_signals: Documentation updates are part of the user-facing contract.
Maintainer asked for external app testing before merge.
A large downstream app was tested and passed unchanged.
A later follow-up noted copied context reuse caused counter issues.
expected_sergeant_findings: Treat as architecture review, not simple cleanup.
Check deprecation aliases and migration behavior.
Verify proxy availability across lifecycle stages.
Focus on teardown ordering, preserved test-client contexts, streaming, shell, and copied-context behavior.
Flag copied-context reuse as a regression risk.
